ECOGREEN SOLUTIONS MChJ — Environmental Responsibility Statement

EcoGreen Solutions is committed to eco-friendly business practices
and environmental responsibility. Our company promotes green values
and sustainable development principles across all operations.

We have successfully obtained the ISO 9001:2015 quality management
certificate, demonstrating our commitment to operational excellence
and customer satisfaction standards.

Our green initiative includes energy-conscious office management,
employee awareness programs on environmental protection, and
a corporate policy on ecological harmony and nature preservation.

The company supports sustainable approaches and green culture.
Standard energy consumption practices apply to all facilities.
No specific renewable infrastructure is currently deployed.

Financial partners have confirmed due diligence compliance.
No regulatory violations recorded in the reporting period.
